qa_pairs.question: What prompts occur during the creation of a key pair backed by a hardware security key?
qa_pairs.answer: During the creation of a key pair backed by a hardware security key, you will be prompted to enter a passphrase and activate the hardware security key.

qa_pairs.question: What method is encouraged for installing an SSH public key?
qa_pairs.answer: Users are encouraged to leverage the new CCDB feature to install their SSH public key.

qa_pairs.question: What is the benefit of installing an SSH public key via CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: Installing an SSH public key via CCDB will make the key available to all our clusters.
